creator: damjan.jov@gmail.com
text:
/compat/linux/proc/N/cwd is supposed to be a symlink to the CWD for PID N. In FreeBSD 13, it's regressed to always being a symlink to the calling process's CWD instead.

Example at https://gitlab.xfce.org/apps/xfce4-terminal/-/issues/121

The code is in sys/compat/linprocfs/linprocfs.c function linprocfs_doproccwd(). It got changed at least twice in 2020.
